JUDGE ERIC LABOWITZ, CLERK R. CONTRERAS, RPTR. DAVID DAVENPORT ATTY. FOR PLTF: STEVEN W. BOWMAN DEFT'S. IN PRO PER 10:15 AM: C/C FOR COURT TRIAL. ALL PRESENT EXCEPT DEFT. FRANCES LUNG. STIPULATED JUDGEMENT REACHED: PLTF. TO HAVE POSSESSION OF PREMISES, 1850 TURK ST. LEASE FORFEITED. WRIT OF EXECUTION STAYED TIL MARCH 9, 1994. PLTF'S. ATTY. TO PREPATE JUDGEMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FRANK, NOLAN LUNG, FRANCES THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1850 TURK ST, S.F, CA., WRIT TO ISSUE IMMEDIATELY.
